query: FIFA World Cup 2026 red card statistics group stage total count June 2026
answer:
## FIFA World Cup 2026 – Group Stage Red Card Statistics (as of June 17, 2026)

### Summary

As of June 17, 2026, the 2026 FIFA World Cup group stage is still in its **Matchday 1 phase** (June 11–17). The tournament has seen a total of **3 red cards** so far, all occurring in a single match — the opening game of the tournament.

---

### Red Card Incidents

All three red cards were issued in the **opening match**:

**Mexico 2–0 South Africa** | June 11, 2026 | Estadio Azteca, Mexico City (Group A)

| # | Player | Team | Minute | Type |
|---|--------|------|--------|------|
| 1 | **Sphephelo Sithole** | South Africa | 49' | Straight red card |
| 2 | **Themba Zwane** | South Africa | 84' | Straight red card (slap on Roberto Alvarado) |
| 3 | **César Montes** | Mexico | 90+2' | Straight red card (denial of goalscoring opportunity, foul on Khuliso Mudau) |

All three were **direct red cards** (not second-yellow dismissals). This was described as "the most red cards in a World Cup opening match" in history. *The Athletic* published an article titled "Breaking down the dirtiest World Cup opening game we've ever seen — or was it?"

---

### Suspensions Resulting from Red Cards

- **Sphephelo Sithole** (South Africa): Suspended for Matchday 2 vs Czech Republic (June 18)
- **Themba Zwane** (South Africa): Suspended for Matchday 2 vs Czech Republic (June 18)
- **César Montes** (Mexico): Suspended for Matchday 2 vs South Korea (June 18)

---

### Fair Play Impact (Group A after Matchday 1)

| Team | Yellow Cards | Direct Red Cards | Fair Play Score |
|------|-------------|-----------------|-----------------|
| Czech Republic | 0 | 0 | 0 |
| South Korea | 1 | 0 | −1 |
| Mexico | 1 | 1 | −5 |
| South Africa | 2 | 2 | −10 |

---

### Other Matchday 1 Results (No Red Cards)

No red cards were issued in any of the other Matchday 1 games played through June 16 (including matches involving USA, Argentina, France, Spain, Netherlands, Belgium, Uruguay, Norway, and others). Matchday 1 concludes on June 17 (today) with Groups K and L.

---

### Context & Data Vintage

- The group stage runs June 11–27, 2026. This data reflects **only Matchday 1** (approximately 24 of 96 group stage matches played).
- The total red card count will likely change as Matchday 2 (June 18–23) and Matchday 3 (June 24–27) are played.
- Historical comparison: The 2022 FIFA World Cup (Qatar) had **4 red cards in the entire group stage** across 48 matches.

---

### Sources

- **Wikipedia** – *2026 FIFA World Cup* (`en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_FIFA_World_Cup`)
- **Wikipedia** – *2026 FIFA World Cup Group A* (`en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_FIFA_World_Cup_Group_A`)
- **ESPN** – Discipline statistics (`espn.com/soccer/stats/_/league/FIFA.WORLD/season/2026/view/discipline`)
- **BBC Sport** – World Cup coverage

key_facts: As of June 17, 2026, there have been 3 red cards in the 2026 FIFA World Cup group stage, all in the opening match (Mexico 2-0 South Africa, June 11, 2026).
All 3 red cards were straight (direct) red cards, not second-yellow dismissals.
Sphephelo Sithole (South Africa) received a straight red in the 49th minute.
Themba Zwane (South Africa) received a straight red in the 84th minute for slapping Mexican forward Roberto Alvarado.
César Montes (Mexico) received a straight red in the 90+2 minute for denial of a goalscoring opportunity (foul on Khuliso Mudau).
This was the most red cards ever in a FIFA World Cup opening match.
No other Matchday 1 games (through June 16) produced any red cards.
The group stage is still ongoing — Matchday 1 finishes June 17, with Matchday 2 (June 18-23) and Matchday 3 (June 24-27) still to be played.
For historical comparison, the 2022 FIFA World Cup had 4 red cards across the entire 48-match group stage.
